'''Calocour Heights''' was a marketing district in the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. It was located between the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Palace of the Republic]], which was to the south, and the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. It was near [[Column Commons]].

Calocour Heights was said to resemble a miniature [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], filled with pushy survey-takers, free product samples floating on [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] carts, and flashing, musical billboards. Some of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most notorious and cutthroat marketing and communications companies set up their headquarters in the Heights, including [[Schaum/Yfarg/Welbig/Fabrico and Associates|SchaumAssoc]] and [[NullComm]]. Though cutting-edge technology was easy to find for sale in the Heights, the area was infamous for its inflated prices.

When Coruscant fell to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during [[Yuuzhan Vong War|their invasion]] of the galaxy, Calocour Heights was one of the areas destroyed in the battle. As Coruscant was terraformed to become [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], the area was razed, and the Heights were replaced by the [[Square of Hierarchy]].
